productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Cfc Auth Hood Green Sweatshirts
description: CompositionDark olive green hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, hood with woven tape drawstring, short zippered placket on the front, distressed look Chelsea F.C. printed on the back with an appliqued seal, distressed look Chelsea emblem on the upper left chest, twill tape detailing from the neckline till the sleeves with the letters C and F embroidered on it, two insert pockets on the sides, embroidered brand logo and name on the right hem and ribbed hemlineFittingRegularWash careWash in water below 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoRoot for the Chelsea football Club everytime you wear this with dark olive green hooded sweatshirt from adidas. The distressed look graphic on the back and the emblem on the upper left chest add to the energetic vibe of this sweatshirt, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this sweatshirt with jeans, tees and sneakers for a cool urban look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
